$comment: Realms orchestra sheet: the desired topology (Sections > Stands > Canisters) for this project's Casals-managed canisters. Each canister references an authorized WASM by `wasm_key` (bare family => latest authorized version). deploy_sheet reconciles by NAME: a stand/canister whose name matches one already registered in Casals reuses that canister (and its bound canister_id) instead of creating a new one — so the names here MUST match the live registrations (see get_tree). Scope: the 3 demo realms + the Casals-deployed infra (installer, realm-registry) + the orchestration governance layer (multisig, per-stand batons). Baton topology: every realm stand carries a `<realm>-baton` (top_commander = the Casals backend via $self) that co-controls the realm's canisters; its commanders are casals-backend + the realm backend under a 2-of-2 approval policy (set post-deploy via orchestration_configure_baton — the sheet only installs the canister). The Infra section's `infra-baton` governs the Casals-deployed infra canisters the same way. Intentionally EXCLUDED: transient provisioning scaffolding (provtest*, casalspilot*), and externally-managed/registered-only infra that Casals does not install (file-registry, marketplace, token, nft, platform-dashboard) — those are registered for reference, not deployed from this sheet. The authorized-WASM catalog itself is managed by publish-build.yml (realm WASMs) and the Casals engine seed (orchestration templates), not here. Regenerate/verify against `icp canister call <casals> get_tree`.
name: realms
description: Realms orchestra: a Deployments section with one stand per demo realm (Dominion, Agora, Syntropia) — each a baton + realm backend + certified-assets frontend — and an Infra section with the multisig, the infra baton, and the Casals-deployed installer and realm-registry.

sections.name: Deployments
sections.description: The demo realms. One stand per realm, each running an orchestration baton (2-of-2 upgrade governance: casals-backend + realm backend), a realm backend canister, and its certified-assets frontend canister. Post-deploy configuration (runtime flags, identity, codex + extension installs) is applied by the environment's Casals arrangement (see ../arrangements), not by the sheet.

sections.name: Infra
sections.description: Shared infrastructure that Casals deploys for this project, plus the orchestration governance layer: the multisig (root of hard control — IC controller of the Casals canisters and every baton; signers configured post-deploy) and the infra baton (managed-upgrade governance for the Casals-deployed infra canisters). Externally-managed/registered-only canisters (file-registry, marketplace, token, nft, platform-dashboard) are intentionally omitted — they are registered with Casals for reference but not installed from this sheet.

stands.name: governance
stands.description: Orchestration governance: the multisig canister (signers + threshold configured post-deploy via its configure method).

stands.name: orchestration
stands.description: Infra baton: governs managed upgrades of the Casals-deployed infra canisters (installer, realm-registry). Top commander + sole commander: the Casals backend.

stands.name: realm-registry
stands.description: Realm registry backend + its certified-assets frontend.
